valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve the range and evidence block until every material assumption is reconciled.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Every currently identified material ownership claim, liability, and option is valued once. Unknown claims remain an evidence blocker, not an unvalued line item.

valuation.evidence: 2025 Form 10-K homebuilding earnings and cash-flow disclosures.
valuation.assumption_summary: Normalize margins, cancellations, housing starts, and working capital; capitalize cash earnings after maintenance needs, not peak GAAP earnings.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

valuation.assumption_summary: Separate mortgage economics from homebuilding and normalize origination volumes, gain-on-sale margins, and repurchase exposure.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

valuation.evidence: 2025 Form 10-K cash less senior notes; operating and mortgage liquidity buffers require further review.
valuation.assumption_summary: Credit only cash demonstrably surplus to land deposits, working capital, mortgage funding, and debt.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

valuation.evidence: NVR primarily controls lots through forfeitable deposits rather than owning land; community-level inventory remains to be reconciled.
valuation.assumption_summary: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

valuation.evidence: 2025 backlog was 8,448 units and cancellation rate 17%; regional and affordability stresses require normalization.
valuation.assumption_summary: Deduct for lower volumes/margins, cancellation risk, community delays, and buybacks executed above intrinsic value.
valuation.cross_check: Range must be reconciled to primary filings, normalized economics, and relevant transaction or public-market evidence before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of NVR, including every identified operating claim, asset, liability, and option.
economic_claim.unit_source: NVR 2025 Form 10-K: 2.794m shares outstanding, $1.340bn net income, $1.610bn homebuilding pretax income, $152m mortgage-banking pretax income, $1.916bn cash, and $909m senior notes.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are included as separate components or within the stated equity basis.

economic_value.accounting_reference: NVR 2025 Form 10-K: 2.794m shares outstanding, $1.340bn net income, $1.610bn homebuilding pretax income, $152m mortgage-banking pretax income, $1.916bn cash, and $909m senior notes.

component_groups.label: Homebuilding owner earnings
component_groups.valuation_basis: Normalize margins, cancellations, housing starts, and working capital; capitalize cash earnings after maintenance needs, not peak GAAP earnings.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key homebuilding_owner_earnings; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Mortgage banking
component_groups.valuation_basis: Separate mortgage economics from homebuilding and normalize origination volumes, gain-on-sale margins, and repurchase exposure.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key mortgage_banking; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Net surplus cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Credit only cash demonstrably surplus to land deposits, working capital, mortgage funding, and debt.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key net_surplus_cash; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Controlled-lot and future-community optionality
component_groups.valuation_basis: Value the asymmetric lot-control structure separately from current earnings, net of deposits, abandonment, and time-to-open.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key lot_control_and_future_communities; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is an explicit analyst judgment pending base-rate and milestone reconciliation.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Scenario range includes delay and failure outcomes.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining capital and financing are deducted in the stated option range.

component_groups.label: Housing-cycle and execution reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Deduct for lower volumes/margins, cancellation risk, community delays, and buybacks executed above intrinsic value.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high values incorporate ownership, tax, funding, cycle, and realization adjustments described in the component evidence.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key housing_cycle_and_execution_reserve; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

wisdom_applied: Buffett/Weschler: measure owner earnings and per-share compounding.
Marathon/Capital Returns: NVR's lot-option model changes the capital-cycle exposure.
Pabrai: preserve the asymmetric ability to abandon lots while testing housing-cycle downside.
limitations: Starter ranges are analyst estimates, not committee-approved price targets.
The model remains evidence-blocked until primary-source normalization, comparable selection, and downside cases pass independent review.

component_valuation_results.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Homebuilding owner earnings
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

falsifiers: Primary evidence or through-cycle results support economics below the low case or reveal an omitted claim.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.
